channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto Firms Race to 'Quantum-Proof' Wallets Before Bitcoin, Ethereum Networks Catch Up
item.description: Crypto companies are upgrading wallets to counter the coming quantum computing threat, but gaps remain.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $80K into weekly close as traders say BTC price dip not yet over
item.description: Bitcoin avoided a weekend drop as $80,000 stayed in place, but traders saw BTC price action dipping below before continuing higher.

item.title: Agentic commerce will run on crypto rails, PayPal and Google reps tell Consensus Miami
item.description: Senior figures from PayPal and Google Cloud said open payment protocols, machine-readable merchant catalogs and multi-party crypto custody are needed to scale agentic commerce.

item.title: AI Models Scheme, Betray and Vote Each Other Out in Survivor-Style Game
item.description: Researchers say multiplayer games may reveal AI behavior that static tests miss.

item.title: Bored Ape NFTs are finally making a comeback as crypto traders rediscover their appetite for risk
item.description: BAYC floor prices have doubled in a month as traders rotate back into speculative crypto bets, reviving hopes of a broader NFT recovery.

item.title: Three young DeFi apps return $100M in revenue to token holders in 30 days
item.description: Hyperliquid, EdgeX and Pump.fun returned a combined $96 million to token holders in 30 days, as the crypto community shifts its focus from transaction volumes to real earnings.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Back to work. $BTC" - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1GbENKZVNZTWx0SC1POG9jY2o3MXFrZElQdVpYVVpoZkp3MHdtNzdNMTFEN2IzZkJhN1p5aFdFYnpLRHJYTWdxWjV5V24wcGIwa1k3Qm00cVJIOTJpWkVzZUhn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints Strategy is “back to work” buying more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9lNkxUMU1SSk1vUmN3N2NNMUFMYTZvS0swSzVuWFBXNlZzam1LVkxaR3pvUXp0amVCVHFmcDJlSWxWYm9Ua2VoOVBETWlFR3BHZEp5MUJhT2FwTVBNWTcwc0xtbVl1U2s?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: South Korea crypto holdings halve in a year as investors turn to stock market
item.description: South Korean crypto holdings fell to $41 billion from $83 billion in just over a year as investors shifted to stocks.

item.title: Bitcoin price may dip toward $70K as Fed estimates hotter inflation print
item.description: BTC’s rising wedge points to a possible drop toward $70,000 as Strategy pauses buying and inflation cools Fed rate-cut hopes.

item.title: Trump Media posts $406M quarterly loss as crypto bets turn sour
item.description: Trump Media’s $405.9 million net loss was driven mostly by unrealized losses on Bitcoin bought at last summer’s peak and Cronos tokens acquired through a Crypto.com deal.

item.title: ⚡ FUN FACT: Strategy owns more than 4% of Bitcoin’s maximum 21 million supply. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9qMlMwLVJNRWN4Qm9lWFEtaVVJbTlMSDVCSzlRMTZFMGZYYzJJNEVUcTlsTTJZQXdFdkVGUFBkS0xkcjNPN0lrUWhUaVBTQXFVcVNiWXQ2YUd1SmpNMFc3dFBYRDU?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡ FUN FACT: Strategy owns more …

item.title: Strategy CEO Says BTC Sales Would Only Happen Under Specific Conditions Strategy CEO Phong Le told CNBC the firm will only sell Bitcoin under specific conditions, such as funding the 11.5% dividend on its STRC preferred stock or for tax optimization. Le - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5IUmxfSmozR0JDNjlFQy1xTVlEdVF4c2Z0Y0w1VW02OFdVZW1LVkF0UGNjRUg3TVpHTnRnemVXV0tsbGhmS3YxUzNtQ3IzVGwtV2podjNyVTFjMXlrRF9WY183dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy CEO Says BTC Sales Woul…

item.title: Santiment flags risk as crypto bullish talk spikes while BTC holds $80K
item.description: The increase in bullish versus bearish crypto commentary on social media has Santiment warning that the recent crypto market rally may be short-lived.

item.title: CZ says crypto exchange rivals opposed his pardon bid
item.description: Binance co-founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao said rival crypto exchanges were concerned a pardon could pave the way for Binance to return to the US market.

item.title: Seven major Bitcoin mining pools join Stratum V2, working group
item.description: Individual miners in Bitcoin mining pools must rely on block templates provided by the mining pool operator.

item.title: My latest thoughts on $BTC, $STRC, and $MSTR with @TheBonnieChang and @davidlin_TV at Consensus 2026. 0:00 - Strategy’s Bitcoin sale controversy 0:36 - Why Strategy may sell Bitcoin 3:12 - “Never sell your Bitcoin” explained 4:40 - How Strategy buy - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1jVzdpdzk3SjVobE1lZ2FBRW05dU8wZC1JcEYxTWlsR2ppMDZJNTlvanM4WHFfd3BmZ3plTkVOeW4zLXZ4cWtDcVVBREFNRmRLZGdDZ3hhVVRXOTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">My latest thoughts on $BTC, $STRC, and $MST…

item.title: Strategy CEO Phong Le says company will sell BTC only in specific cases
item.description: Strategy's Bitcoin sales will not move the markets, despite it owning more than 4% of the digital currency's maximum supply, Le said.

item.title: 🚨 JUST IN: Ethereum’s share of DeFi TVL has fallen from 63.5% to 54% this year, though it still leads the market with $45.4 billion locked. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9pTHEyN0hUckdTNmVkVlhVaDlsaGh0OTFfSE1MXzRLNWs0aTFlZ0FNSm4xMWZnR29lb2RlMzU1alg1bThEUjR4N0NveXFuS005VzJHVHJJS0NfWWpuSWVFVl91UWI?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 JUST IN: Ethereum’s share of…

item.title: CLARITY Act will help reshore US crypto industry, attorney says
item.description: The "biggest market" in crypto is conducting the vast majority of its trading volume outside of US-based exchanges, according to Attorney Bill Hughes.

item.title: Bitcoin is back above $81,000. Pray for this weekend pump to be real. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE10TzB5ei0xaHgxWjhVRXV3NmY4ZEJDUlZXcnMyWnNhZE1jVUk3WXBaNTRzeW81NE5pOXF4eDVUUHpvTTg0d29oWElxazh5QVlPZGVpNU5fWnpWZ1FUYXdV?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is back above $81,000. Pray fo…

item.title: The Nobitex dilemma: How Iran's biggest crypto exchange stays off the OFAC blacklist
item.description: Iran entered the final night of February 2026 under a near-total internet shutdown. In the wake of a joint strike by the United States and Israel, Tehran almost completely severed the country's connection to the global internet — likely le…

item.title: Trump Media’s Q1 loss widens to $406 million on bitcoin, CRO markdowns
item.description: The loss was primarily driven by $244 million in unrealized losses on cryptocurrency holdings and an additional $108.2 million investment loss.

item.title: Australian Police Seize Millions in Bitcoin From Alleged Darknet Marketplace Operator
item.description: Two men face money laundering and drug charges following the seizure of $4.2 million in Bitcoin from alleged darknet marketplace dealings.

item.title: Sports betting should be regulated as a financial product, not gambling, aspiring prediction market provider says
item.description: Novig CEO Jacob Fortinsky said his company will transition to a federal Designated Contract Market framework this summer to launch in all 50 states, while 57 Maiden's Adam Mastrelli said he was banned from two major sportsbooks within two …

item.title: It might be too late for bitcoin’s quantum migration, Project Eleven report argues
item.description: Quantum computing does not only pose a risk to up to $3 trillion in digital assets, it also threatens the security of banking systems, military communications, digital identities and more, Project Eleven’s report warns.

item.title: Crypto industry cheers Senate Clarity Act markup date as market structure push resumes
item.description: The bill's progress follows talks on jurisdiction, consumer/developer protections, and stablecoin rewards, with crypto firms backing a yield compromise.

item.title: Emerging-market users are treating crypto exchanges like banking apps, Binance says
item.description: One point three billion adults lack financial services, 4.7 billion lack credit, and 1.4 billion savers in low-income nations earn no deposit interest, Binance said.

item.title: Why a 2017 Linux bug is now a major concern for the crypto industry
item.description: The “Copy Fail” Linux bug could impact crypto infrastructure that relies on Linux servers, highlighting growing cybersecurity risks in the digital asset industry. Format: Explained

item.title: Swiss central bank bitcoin reserve push fails over signature shortfall
item.description: The initiative sought to amend Switzerland's constitution, requiring the Swiss National Bank (SNB) to hold BTC alongside gold and foreign-currency reserves.

item.title: CME is set to let traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not just price
item.description: CME Group plans to launch bitcoin volatility futures on June 1 pending regulatory approval bringing a easy way to bet on the degree of price swings.

item.title: How DeFi is changing the financial landscape for Latin Americans
item.description: DeFi is quietly shifting from niche crypto experiment to a legitimate financial tool across the region, explains Serrano.

item.title: TeraWulf doubles AI revenue but posts $427M quarterly loss as mining income declines
item.description: TeraWulf’s HPC lease revenue jumped 117% quarter-on-quarter to $21 million, but a $427 million net loss highlights the costs of transitioning from Bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure.

item.title: Crypto wallets are being rebuilt for AI agents, Trust Wallet and Mesh executives say at Consensus Miami
item.description: Trust Wallet CEO Felix Fan and Mesh CTO Arjun Mukherjee said AI agents are creating a new role for crypto wallets.

item.title: BlackRock deepens tokenization push with new onchain fund offerings
item.description: The world's largest asset manager filed paperwork to expand its tokenized fund lineup as real-world assets grow 200% year over year.

item.title: NEW: 🇺🇸 Senator Lummis puts back on her laser eyes as Senate Banking Committee will officially vote on Bitcoin & crypto market structure bill next week 👀 "Let's pass the Clarity Act out of the Banking Committee on Thursday!" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE8zRFJHT0VWSTNaTWVHZ1RtVmRZelRVSXRfaEg4TTN6MEJvVkZzSHl3YmU5NHJkSWpFQzV1c1M4MXV0NzR0d09ELV83QnktdFpXczVWMVpEc2hrdElhX3NnVlFWMnFYekE?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: 🇺🇸 Senator Lummis pu…

item.title: LayerZero says it ‘made a mistake’ in $292 Million Kelp exploit
item.description: After initially framing the exploit as a developer configuration failure, LayerZero said it “owns” the decision to let its own verifier secure high-value transfers in a vulnerable setup.

item.title: Olympic Sprinter Can't Outrun Charges in UK Crypto Fraud Investigation
item.description: U.K. police charged British sprinter CJ Ujah in an alleged crypto fraud scheme involving wallet seed phrase theft and impersonation calls.

item.title: Bitcoin per share (BPS) is our True North. Every day, @Strategy uses multivariate models to optimize capital, equity, debt, and credit decisions to maximize annual BTC Yield (growth in BPS). YTD, we’ve achieved 9.4% BTC Yield and $5.0 billion in BTC Gain. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5CZXh0Zm1MNlFVWGVKSkVqOUpUUGF1Q3k5S2FMejJ4Q1ljTUtVWWczSkoxRlBOQUtVZWJMWjZMbFpIOXJfREtmcE5SUjFvUHBXWThVdVUyMlljYmQy?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin per share (BPS) is our True North.…

item.title: LATEST: 📈 Michael Saylor predicts Bitcoin will average a 30% annual return over the next 20 years. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9UdnJhQkpfbkZ6a2RsR2ZQS1NOUEdRSXZBSDBtTWUyVTZlUDhyX1FIcUI1QjB4TW5yZmhSYm5jR0x6OU9NV28ybzB3U2JUd2tDbDBUaF9zcTFmRGYzaXhBSWNnN1I?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 📈 Michael Saylor predi…

item.title: A COW JUST BEAT BITCOIN‼️ If you'd swapped your $BTC stack for cattle last May, you'd be the smartest guy on CT. 🐮Live cattle are up 13.1%, while ₿itcoin is down 22%. That is a ~35-point performance gap in favor of cows. The BULL MARKET was appar - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE05S1ppSGNrX05oNUc5M1BBWkhMcUl4aEFrcmtmV3liUDQ5WEhjQTNybEVnSmJPQUVMQ3MwNGZRYkdfdS1jal9WdVJ6ZlVmUjNFZF85MVhGVVZVSDRUTnBKQg?oc=5" target="_blank">A COW JUST BEAT BITCOIN‼️ If you'd s…

item.title: Court lets Arbitrum DAO transfer $71M in ETH tied to North Korea hack to Aave
item.description: A Manhattan judge modified a restraining notice to let Arbitrum DAO move $71 million in frozen Ether to Aave, while preserving terrorism victims’ legal claim on the funds.

item.title: The question is: How long does #Bitcoin continue to go up, to give #Altcoins space to continue to run? Well, as long as the daily 21-MA acts beneath the current price, there's more legroom to go. I do think that we'll have more upside and that we might be testin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1xM3V4UHJMbE1MMWNpNWJPM2FTQjl4X0JscjNYMHVIVFNqRDR2SHdSelRJLUl5dVdyMjNXUnFhQkJuNU12TzQ0OVFtdXdUUzRKWmRTTmhISi1EU2tZRVphVG5rSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">The question is: How long does #…

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs log 6th straight week of net inflows for first time in 9 months
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs have logged six consecutive weeks of net inflows, the longest such streak since a seven-week run that drew in $7.57 billion in the summer of 2025.

item.title: 🔥 CRYPTO EXCHANGES PUSHED TO REMOVE CLARITY ACT'S "RISKY TOKEN RULES" A new report says Coinbase, Kraken and Gemini pushed lawmakers to remove language from a crypto bill targeting risky token listings. The rule would have forced ex - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1UaDZ5eDRuY0FoMTZpYWlJLWJVZDNrMmdacUN1NEhkYkRMeDYxZG00U1RaYWo2RFJfaVFfUklvOVI1ZFpzMVA0bGU3dlVLcDRudjg2VzBuWU14dkd1OURIbw?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 CRYPTO EXCHANGES PUSHED TO REMOVE…

item.title: Strike CEO Jack Mallers dismisses idea that Wall Street threatens Bitcoin
item.description: Strike CEO Jack Mallers argued that if Wall Street “kills” Bitcoin, then the asset was never going to succeed in the first place.

item.title: Ethereum Dominance in DeFi TVL Falls to 54%, Still Leads with $45.4 Billion According to CryptoSlate, citing DeFiLlama data, Ethereum's share of Total Value Locked (TVL) in DeFi has decreased from 63.5% at the start of 2025 to approximately 54% as of Ma - x.com

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Crypto security breaches surged to over $635 million across 28 incidents in April 2026, marking the worst month for crypto exploits this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0xMVR4SEJVRDlHX044MExINGZxaEFLak04Ti1sZmhVUGZ3ekJyT3dnOEpiNDhUU3F1R2NfczU5TkxUc2xRWTNQdVRxS0VZcGdPUlYxUnFvWEJZLTdWTUVwdlZXZDQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Crypto security breac…

item.title: Judge clears path for Aave to move $71 million in ETH linked to North Korea hack
item.description: Judge Margaret Garnett allowed frozen exploit funds on Arbitrum to move to Aave, but the legal freeze follows the assets as terrorism plaintiffs continue their claim.

item.title: US CLARITY Act sees ‘big step forward’ as markup set for May 14
item.description: Coinbase chief policy officer Faryar Shirzad said the date is a “big step forward” and is essential for supporting innovation in the US.

item.title: JUST IN: BlackRock to launch tokenized money-market funds on Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB4MHRxMGptU1l1OVpWT3dqSHRYSWt2OTlJdnhoX3RTMGhhSlhQeFR3WklnaWpsQ3ZVc3g1MG5nQm11TG9XVTNVUVozSmYxMHVrQUtad2NEVGtobTV2dTJOa293?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: BlackRock to launch token…

item.title: Bitcoin stalls as BTC ETF outflows hit $268M: Will new Fed chair restore the rally?
item.description: Rising Bitcoin ETF outflows and liquidations signal short-term caution, but a weak DXY and the eventual appointment of a new Fed chair could resume the rally.

item.title: Senate Banking Committee plans to hold key market structure hearing on Thursday
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee announced it would hold its markup hearing for the Clarity Act on March 14.

item.title: ⚡️ JUST IN: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee predicts Bitcoin could reach $250,000 and Ethereum $12,000 this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1fQWZhTUNmOHBhM1lFX1FMODhaQ3BkVVlxZWpPYjlmWVVGc2tnbl9RMXBPNWVrMkU1azdMLV8wUnV5Z2J3MDVuWnROa05fd29xTjVGd191dThmZEVrQW9pOVV2alA?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ JUST IN: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee…

item.title: Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens: Report
item.description: Three companies reportedly pressed US senators for changes to a crypto bill, removing language that would require them to offer trading on tokens “not readily susceptible to manipulation.”

item.title: Banking Industry Says Clarity Act Stablecoin Proposal Would Enable 'Evasion'
item.description: Senators had hoped the issue, which has plagued crypto legislation for months, had been put to bed with a proposed compromise last week.

item.title: Coinbase rebounds as altcoins surge with bitcoin holding above $80,000
item.description: Tokenization and digital asset-infrastructure stocks climbed as SEC Chair Paul Atkins signaled support for onchain finance rules.

item.title: TeraWulf's AI Compute Revenue Outpaces Bitcoin Mining Amid $427 Million Loss
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner and data center operator TeraWulf reported a hefty net loss in Q1 as its AI revenue took over from BTC.

item.title: Intel Stock Hits All-Time High After Preliminary Chip Deal With Apple
item.description: A preliminary Apple-Intel manufacturing agreement—backed by a White House push—sent Intel stock above $130 on Friday.
